title: Accessibility Statement
description: URCity accessibility statement — our commitment to making the site usable for everyone.
content:
Accessibility Statement

Last updated: June 28, 2026

Publisher: Northshore Press (https://northshorepress.co)

Our Commitment

Northshore Press is committed to ensuring digital accessibility for people with disabilities. We are continually improving the user experience for everyone and applying the relevant accessibility standards.

Conformance Status

The Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) defines requirements for designers and developers to improve accessibility for people with disabilities. It defines three levels of conformance: Level A, Level AA, and Level AAA.

URCity.com is partially conformant with WCAG 2.1 Level AA. Partially conformant means that some parts of the content do not fully conform to the accessibility standard.

Accessibility Features

We have implemented the following accessibility features on URCity.com:

  • Keyboard Navigation — All interactive elements are accessible via keyboard
  • Skip Links — Skip-to-content links are available on all pages
  • Semantic HTML — Proper heading structure and landmark regions
  • Alt Text — Descriptive alt text on images where applicable
  • Color Contrast — Text meets minimum contrast ratios
  • Responsive Design — Content is accessible on various screen sizes and zoom levels

Known Limitations

Despite our best efforts, some limitations may exist:

  • Some data tables may be difficult to navigate with screen readers
  • Some interactive calculators may not be fully accessible to all assistive technologies
  • Third-party embedded content may not meet accessibility standards

We are actively working to address these limitations.

Feedback

We welcome your feedback on the accessibility of URCity.com. If you encounter accessibility barriers or have suggestions for improvement, please contact us:

  • Email: accessibility@urcity.com
  • Response Time: We aim to respond within 5 business days.

Assessment

Accessibility of URCity.com is assessed through:

  • Self-evaluation using automated accessibility testing tools
  • Manual testing with keyboard navigation
  • Periodic review of content and templates

Enforcement Procedure

Northshore Press takes accessibility seriously. If you believe we have not adequately addressed your accessibility concerns, please contact us at accessibility@urcity.com.

Changes to This Statement

We may update this Accessibility Statement at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.
